summary: Powerful Other One performance but hampered by very poor audience recording quality
review: Reviewers rave about the jaw‑dropping rendition of The Other One, indicating a strong musical show, yet both note that the AUD (audience) source is so low‑fidelity they can’t get through the set. The recording’s muddiness outweighs the performance’s merits for most listeners.

ai_rating.rationale: The show receives praise for a standout Other One, but the audience‑recording quality is described as unlistenable, resulting in an overall low to moderate rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Sound is muddy and difficult to follow; reviewers abandoned listening for a cleaner reference copy.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on pacing or flow beyond the highlighted Other One.
